files.backend/package.json:
{
  "name": "twitch-sync-backend",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Backend service for TwitchSync - Twitch VOD and game tracking system",
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "nodemon --exec \"ts-node\" src/index.ts",
    "build": "tsc",
    "lint": "eslint . --ext .ts",
    "lint:fix": "eslint . --ext .ts --fix",
    "test": "jest",
    "migrate": "ts-node scripts/migrate.ts",
    "migrate:rollback": "ts-node scripts/migrate.ts rollback",
    "db:reset": "psql -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -f scripts/reset-db.sql"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "axios": "^1.4.0",
    "cors": "^2.8.5",
    "cron-parser": "^4.9.0",
    "dotenv": "^16.4.7",
    "express": "^4.21.2",
    "jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.2",
    "node-cron": "^3.0.2",
    "pg": "^8.11.0",
    "uuid": "^11.0.3",
    "winston": "^3.17.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/cors": "^2.8.17",
    "@types/express": "^4.17.21",
    "@types/jest": "^29.5.1",
    "@types/jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.7",
    "@types/node": "^18.19.68",
    "@types/pg": "^8.6.6",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^5.59.2",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^5.59.2",
    "eslint": "^8.39.0",
    "jest": "^29.5.0",
    "nodemon": "^2.0.22",
    "ts-jest": "^29.1.0",
    "ts-node": "^10.9.1",
    "typescript": "^5.0.4"
  }
}
